title: scorzonera suberosa subsp. cariensis
intro: Scorzonera suberosa subsp. cariensis is a plant species within the genus Scorzonera, commonly known as a type of salsify or scorzonera. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include potential uses in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as lowering blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Scorzonera suberosa subsp. cariensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
